# Iron Man 2: The Video Game

name: Ironman 2: Memory Infinite Shield + Health
mode: once
w32 12028DBC 3F800000
w32 12028FAC 3F800000
w32 12159F7C 3F800000
w32 12159FE8 43020000
w32 1347F3E8 43020000

name: Ironman 2: ASM Infinite Shield + Health
mode: once
w32 00280924 A1690020
w32 00280928 60000000
w32 00280930 D00B0000
w32 00280C60 60000000
w32 00280C64 60000000
w32 00280C68 60000000
w32 00280C6C 60000000
w32 00280C70 60000000
w32 00280C78 60000000
w32 002FFF9C 60000000
w32 007D2EF4 980B0000
w32 007D30CC 60000000

name: Ironman 2: Memory No Waiting Time For Missiles
mode: once
w32 125A3178 40C00000
w32 125A31F0 40C00000

name: Ironman 2: ASM No Waiting Time For Missiles
mode: once
w32 00280C70 60000000
w32 00280C78 60000000
